programs.title: Swamp People: Serpent Invasion
programs.desc: Troy and his crew return to the Louisiana swamps to extract the valuable treasure trove of old-growth cypress logs they discovered last season. Determined to capitalize on a rare spell of high water, Troy, Pickle, and veteran swamper Timmy Aucoin follow a storied map to relocate the prized wood. Then using Timmy’s specialized boat called the “log dog,” and every ounce of swamp ingenuity they can muster, the team attempts to secure a payday for the ages.

programs.title: Australia ReDiscovered
programs.desc: Join Ricko as he heads to Townsville to rediscover its wartime secrets before heading into the scrub to get to the bottom of an age-old mystery, and he also tells the tale of a legendary shearer!

programs.title: American Restoration
programs.desc: Pawn Star Chumlee rolls into the shop with a 1950's Murray pedal car and a specific vision for how he wants it restored. And later the crew works to fix up a 1965 Honda Superhawk.

programs.title: Storage Wars
programs.sub_title: Cloudy With A Chance Of Profit
programs.desc: It’s a momentous occasion in Van Nuys for Darrell, and he has a completely groovy time with it. Ivy starts his day off with an unwelcome bang. Brandi & Jarrod are left wondering whether their unit will bring clear skies or clouds ahead.

programs.title: American Pickers
programs.desc: The guys reckon petroliana is plentiful in the Lone Star State, but tracking down a Texas-sized honey hole proves much trickier than expected.

programs.title: Pawn Stars
programs.sub_title: Best Of - Don't Judge A Pawn By Its
programs.desc: Will an 1842 Book of Mormon make Rick a believer? Will he wait for winter to come for a limited edition signed Game of Thrones, or be sucked in by P.T. Barnum's tell-all tale?
